chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza C.P. No. D – 4994 of 2025 [Rashid Mehmood vs. FOP & others] Petitioner: Rashid Mehmood son of Ghulam Farid, through Mr. Zaheeruddin Qamar, Advocate. Date of hearing: 18-11-2025 Date of decision: 18-11-2025 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. – It is contended that though the wine-shop licensed in the vicinity had closed-down, but the Respondents 6 and 7 are carrying on distribution of alcohol within that vicinity which is a Muslim dominanted neighborhood. Since it is not been contended that conditions of license of the wine-shop are being violated, no writ can issue to private persons. The Petitioner may avail remedies available at law. With that observation, the petition is dismissed as misconceived. JUDGE JUDGE SHABAN*
